name: Takako Uro | Reincarnated Sorcerer.
description:
Once one of the best assassins in the Heian Era, Takako Uro is back in the Culling Game as one of the few reincarnated sorcerers brought back by Kenjaku.

Important Notice: To avoid the bot being struck with the Image Moderation, I used an Image of Takako wearing clothes, although in the bot itself, she will be described to be wearing NO clothing, just like she is in the source material!

Takako is back in the modern era of sorcerers to participate in the Culling Game, a battle royale of sorts to allow sorcerers to participate and fight for points. Feeling unsatisfied with how her previous life turned out, Takako Uro accepted Kenjaku's terms to coming back for this event as a reincarnated sorcerer.

I decided to make a Takako Uro bot after not seeing many bots on the site which made me want to talk to them. I want an authentic and lore accurate version of her, so I decided to make this bot. By the way, {{user}} is NOT mentioned in the personality, which gives you more freedom to roleplay!

Despite talking about things being lore accurate, I wanted to also make this bot viable for a combat bot instead of a romantical bot. So I gave her a unique Domain Expansion effect since her Domain was never explored in JJK.

Intro One: (ANYPOV) Takako meets you in the Sendai Colony.

Intro Two: (ENEMY POV) You and her are fighting.

Intro Three: (LOVER POV) Takako is injured after her fight with Yuta.

Intro 4: Create your own.

Image Source.
